name: genomad-circuits
description: ZK circuits for Genomad trait verification and breeding

scripts.compile:all: npm run compile:trait && npm run compile:breed && npm run compile:custody
scripts.setup:trait: snarkjs groth16 setup build/trait/trait.r1cs pot12_final.ptau build/trait/trait_0000.zkey
scripts.setup:breed: snarkjs groth16 setup build/breed/breed.r1cs pot12_final.ptau build/breed/breed_0000.zkey
scripts.setup:custody: snarkjs groth16 setup build/custody/custody.r1cs pot12_final.ptau build/custody/custody_0000.zkey
scripts.verify:trait: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/trait/trait_0000.zkey build/trait/verification_key.json
scripts.solidity:trait: snarkjs zkey export solidityverifier build/trait/trait_0000.zkey contracts/TraitVerifier.sol
